copy.multiPollsTitle: From destination to restaurant: decide everything together
copy.multiPollsSubtitle: Destinations, activities, restaurants, dates… everything can be decided together.
copy.freeNoCard: Free signup. No credit card required.

page.heroSubtitle: Pizza or sushi? Hotel or Airbnb? One quick vote replaces 47 WhatsApp messages.

features.title: Anonymous or public
features.description: Choose if votes are visible or hidden

features.title: Reminders
features.description: Automatically nudge those who haven't voted

faqItems.question: How do I create a poll for my travel group?
faqItems.answer: In seconds! Choose a poll type (destination, restaurant, activity, date), add your options, and share.

faqItems.question: Are votes anonymous?
faqItems.answer: Your choice! You can create public polls or anonymous ones.

faqItems.question: Can I set a voting deadline?
faqItems.answer: Yes, you can schedule an end date and time. Non-voters get automatic reminders.

faqItems.question: What happens in case of a tie?
faqItems.answer: Several options: run a runoff between tied options, let the creator decide, or use random selection.

faqItems.question: Can I vote for multiple options?
faqItems.answer: Yes! You can allow multiple votes or single vote.

page.seoDescription: Make group decisions easily with Weplanify polls. Vote in real-time to choose destinations, activities, and restaurants.
